EmailTemplate.name: AES - Candidate rejection email
EmailTemplate.subject: Update on your application with Alliance Extra Staff
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hi {!Contact.FirstName},
Thank you for taking the time to apply with Alliance Extra Staff. We regret to inform you that we won’t be moving forward with your application at this time.
If you have any questions, please feel free to call our friendly staff on 1300 662 511.
Kind regards, Your team at Alliance Extra Staff
